title: The Grizzlies
overview: In a small Arctic town struggling with the highest suicide rate in North America, a group of Inuit students' lives are transformed when they are introduced to the sport of lacrosse.

trailers.title: Interview with Miranda De Pencier, Anna Lambe and Paul Nutarariaq
